value.found_quote:
Set up logging
Learn how to set up Cloud Logging for your agents deployed on Agent Platform.
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists a "Set up logging" guide described as enabling Cloud Logging for agents deployed on Agent Platform, which directly matches the claim. The page also notes at the top: "Preview. This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'", indicating the overall Agent Platform offering (including this feature) is in Preview status.
